positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a soaring golden retriever puppy chasing a vibrant rainbow arc through a stylized meadow. The composition should be central and symmetrical, using strong, solid black lines and a limited color palette of sky blue, emerald green, and bright gold accents. The style should be modern Nordic folk art meets vintage tattoo flash, emphasizing clean, thick outlines and a clean silhouette. The background elements (grass blades, stylized clouds) should be simple geometric patterns that do not distract from the main subject. High contrast, graphic design print quality, perfect for textile printing, centered, full-body view.
